title: Understanding the Problem
text: The car starts from rest and accelerates at a constant rate. We need to find out how far it travels in $$12$$ seconds.

title: Identify the Known Values
text:
Identify the values given in the problem:
- Initial velocity (u) $$=$$ $$0$$ $$ rac{m}{s}$$ (since the car starts from rest)
- Acceleration (a) $$=$$ $$2.40$$ $$ rac{m}{s^2}$$
- Time (t) $$=$$ $$12.0$$ s

title: Choose the Right Equation
text: To find the displacement (s), use the equation of motion:\ns $$=$$ $$u t+0.5a t^2$$

title: Calculate the Displacement
text: Substitute the known values into the equation:\ns $$=$$ $$0\times12+0.5\times2.4\times{12}^2$$
